content.en:
As a powerhouse among the gods of the universe, the immortal army lord is really unsightly with ordinary treasures, even if it is an origin artifact, although he can see it, he will not go crazy.

Because he himself also had an Origin Artifact, and the Origin Knife Weapon was not suitable for him, he was just surprised, not too shocked.

But now, the emergence of chaotic rare earths is different.

Chaos rare earth is an incomparably important resource, which is useless for galaxy level and galaxy level, but it is of great use to the cosmic gods, especially for some cosmic gods who have just broken through, the chaotic rare earth is like a treasure.

If a person reaches the realm of the cosmic god, the world in the body will transform into a small universe, but just after breaking through to the realm of the cosmic god, the small universe in the body is very unstable, and it takes a long time of retreat to stabilize the small universe in the body.

However, chaotic rare earths can make the small universe stable and can expand the small universe.

If there were no treasures such as Chaos Rare Earth, it would take at least hundreds of thousands of years for a cosmic god to rely on his own efforts to stabilize the small universe, and if he wanted to cultivate to the peak realm of the cosmic god, it would even take hundreds of millions of years or more.

But chaotic rare earths are too rare, and they can only be obtained when the universe expands and the chaotic tide comes.

However, the Chaos Tide was basically occupied by the nine supreme-level forces, and people like the Undead War Lord had no chance to enter the Chaos Tide with a great explosion of resources, and the ordinary area of the Chaos Tide did not have many resources at all, let alone obtain Chaos Rare Earth.

Therefore, the Chaos Rare Earth is so precious that even the Undead War Master has only seen it at an auction.

Now, this is the second time we have seen Chaos Rare Earth.

"Wanfa True Monarch, you were able to get Chaos Rare Earth, it must not have been given by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, after all, you are only at the galaxy level now, and Chaos Rare Earth is useless to you!" the Undead Army Lord asked.

"Naturally, it was not given by the supreme hall of the human race, but I obtained it by chance!"

Ye Tian said.

In fact, the Chaos Rare Earth was obtained by him in the Chaos Small World, and the Dark Heavenly Ape took him into the lair of the Heavenly Mangbeast, the overlord of the Chaos Small World, and the treasures hidden in his lair were all wiped out by Ye Tian.

At that time, he didn't know many treasures, but after he came back, he investigated them one by one and learned about the usefulness of these treasures, one of which was Chaos Rare Earth.

He knew that the cosmic god was very eager for the Chaos Rare Earth, so he took out such a treasure, which could not only attract the Sword Feather God Lord, but also definitely attract the Yan Dao Allah.

Regardless of whether Allah of the Yan Dao has succeeded in impacting the Cosmic God Realm, he needs Chaos Rare Earth.

"Wanfa True Monarch, how many Chaos Rare Earths do you have in your hands?"

The Undead Lord asked with a wistful expression.

"Undead War Master, you also want Chaos Rare Earth?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Yes!" The undead army lord said embarrassedly: "There are too few resources in the disk domain, and there are few opportunities, I have been cultivating for millions of years, and I am only at the seventh order of the universe god so far, if I can obtain some chaotic rare earths, I can not only make the small universe in my body more stable, but also accelerate the growth of the small universe, so that my cultivation can reach the ninth order as soon as possible." At that point, I'll be much stronger. So, I really need Chaos Rare Earths!"

"Immortal War Master, I don't have many Chaos Rare Earths in my hands, I can only provide you with 300 catties at most, and I still need to take out 100 catties and put them in the auction, otherwise it will not be conducive to the execution of my plan!" Ye Tian said apologetically.

"300 pounds, enough is enough!"

The undead lord said happily.

He didn't expect Ye Tian to have many rare earths, after all, this was a scarce resource that even he couldn't get!

Even if Ye Tian only traded a few dozen catties to him, he was very excited, and it would soon be 300 catties!

Soon, the two closed the deal.

The undead army master did not let Ye Tian suffer, not only paid a large amount of divine crystals and some chaos crystals, but also gave Ye Tian some chaos resources that could be used at the galaxy level and galaxy level, and their total value was more than 300 catties of chaos rare earths.

But in fact, no matter how many resources you have, it's hard to exchange them for Chaos Rare Earths, because others won't sell them.

However, what the undead army master didn't know was that the chaotic rare earth in Ye Tian's hand was far more than 400 catties, but as many as thousands of catties.

However, he himself will need Chaos Rare Earths in the future, so naturally he will not take them all out.

Subsequently.

The undead army lord arranged for Ye Tian to live in the Immortal God City, and the undead army master arranged for the auction, and the location was ready to be set up in the Immortal God City.

At the same time, news about the auction also spread out one by one, and even the news of the Chaos Rare Earth and the Origin Knife Weapon was also spread through secret channels.

Of course.

The news is limited to the Ganges River system in the area and has not been transmitted outward, otherwise it is easy to cause unnecessary changes.

Soon.

The Ten Thousand Ancient Sects, the Divine Desolation Palace, the Ruthless Valley, and the newly promoted Overlord-level Sword Emperor Sect of the Ganga River System all learned of this auction.

Sword Emperor Sect.

The Sword Feather Divine Lord sat on the high throne of the gods, holding an invitation in his hand, revealing a look of curiosity.

This invitation has just been sent by the Undead Legion, and it is an invitation to the auction.

"It's strange, the Undead Legion rarely involves auctions, why did this time suddenly open an auction?"

Curious, it's not surprising that the Undead Legion is holding an auction.

Immediately, he paid a little attention to the situation of the auction, and after learning that the Origin Knife and Chaos Rare Earth would appear in the auction, he immediately couldn't sit still.

"Chaos rare earth, you must get it!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord said excitedly.

That's when it happened.

He sensed the vibration of the transmitter and immediately took it out.

A voice came from the communicator—

"Big brother, I heard that the Undead Legion will open an auction, there will be an auction of the Origin Knife and the Chaos Rare Earth at the auction, the Origin Knife can be auctioned to get the best, it doesn't matter if it can't be auctioned, but the Chaos Rare Earth must be auctioned for me, I need the Chaos Rare Earth!"

The messenger is Allah!

Hearing this, the Sword Feather Divine Lord frowned and said, "Second brother, it's too dangerous for you to contact me at this time, just in case...... Besides, I also need Chaos Rare Earth, and it hasn't been long since I broke through to the Universe God Realm, and I also need Chaos Rare Earth. "

"Big brother, don't forget, if it weren't for the fact that I had obtained a lot of resources for you in the Divine Blade Alliance, you would have been able to achieve what you have today? I need to improve my strength, stabilize my realm, and then slowly find a way to leave the Terrans. Once I'm gone, I'll never come to you again, and you won't have to worry about being implicated by me, how?" said Allah Yandao.

"Okay! If I successfully auction off the Chaos Rare Earth, I want half of it, and the remaining half will be given to you, this is the limit!"

Sword Feather God Lord.

Allah was silent for a while, and said, "Okay, it's up to you!"

The communicator stopped vibrating, and the Sword Feather Divine Lord breathed a sigh of relief.

Every time he communicated with Allah of the Yan Dao, he was very panicked, for fear that a master would come and directly wipe him out.

Next, the Sword Feather Divine Lord continued to raise resources to prepare for the auction of the Undead Legion.

Time passes slowly –

On this day, the auction of the Undead Legion was about to begin, and the heads and important figures of the other four overlord-level forces, as well as some powerful scattered cultivators, eight or nine star forces came to the Immortal God City one after another.

For a while, the Immortal God City was far more lively than before, almost a crowded scene.
